1	---
2	name: CI
3	on:
4	  push:
5	    branches:
6	      - main
7	    tags:
8	      - v*
9	  pull_request:
10	jobs:
11	  renovatebot:
12	    name: 🤖 Detect renovatebot action
13	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
14	    permissions:
15	      pull-requests: read
16	    if: |
17	      !startsWith(github.event.head_commit.message, 'build: update Nix dependency hashes') ||
18	       github.ref_type == 'tag'
19	    steps:
20	      - name: Detect package ecosystem from changed files
21	        if: github.actor == 'renovate[bot]' && github.event_name == 'pull_request'
22	        id: detect
23	        env:
24	          GH_TOKEN: ${{ github.token }}
25	        run: |
26	          files=$(gh api repos/${{ github.repository }}/pulls/${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}/files --jq '.[].filename')
27	          has_npm=false
28	          has_gomod=false
29	          if echo "$files" | grep -q '^console/frontend/pnpm-lock.yaml$'; then
30	            has_npm=true
31	          fi
32	          if echo "$files" | grep -qE '^go\.sum$'; then
33	            has_gomod=true
34	          fi
35	          case $has_npm,$has_gomod in
36	            true,false) echo "package-ecosystem=npm" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT" ;;
37	            false,true) echo "package-ecosystem=gomod" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT" ;;
38	          esac
39	    outputs:
40	      package-ecosystem: ${{ steps.detect.outputs.package-ecosystem }}
41	
42	  build-linux:
43	    name: 🐧 Test on Linux
44	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
45	    needs:
46	      - build-go
47	      - build-js
48	    permissions:
49	      contents: read
50	      actions: write
51	    strategy:
52	      matrix:
53	        tests:
54	          - part 1
55	          - part 2
56	          - misc
57	        include:
58	          - tests: part 1
59	            compose: true
60	            racetests: true
61	            jstests: true
62	          - tests: part 2
63	            compose: true
64	            coverage: true
65	          - tests: misc
66	            binary: ${{ github.ref_type == 'tag' }}
67	    env:
68	      CI_AKVORADO_FUNCTIONAL_TESTS: "true"
69	      CI_AKVORADO_EBPF: "true"
70	    steps:
71	      # Setup
72	      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6
73	        with:
74	          fetch-depth: ${{ matrix.binary && 0 || 1 }}
75	          persist-credentials: false
76	      - uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@4d04d5d9486b7bd6fa91e7baf45bbb4f8b9deedd # v4
77	        if: matrix.compose
78	      - name: Docker Compose up
79	        if: matrix.compose
80	        run: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose-dev.yml up --wait --wait-timeout 60 --quiet-pull
81	      - name: Setup
82	        uses: ./.github/actions/setup
83	      - name: Install dependencies
84	        run: sudo apt-get install -qqy shared-mime-info curl zip
85	
86	      # Code tests
87	      - name: Go race tests
88	        if: matrix.racetests
89	        run: sudo -E capsh --keep=1 --user=$USER --caps=cap_bpf+eip --addamb=cap_bpf -- -c "env PATH=$PATH make test-race"
90	      - name: JS tests
91	        if: matrix.jstests
92	        run: make test-js
93	      - name: Coverage tests
94	        if: matrix.coverage
95	        run: sudo -E capsh --keep=1 --user=$USER --caps=cap_bpf+eip --addamb=cap_bpf -- -c "env PATH=$PATH make test-coverage"
96	      - name: Upload coverage results
97	        if: matrix.coverage
98	        uses: actions/upload-artifact@043fb46d1a93c77aae656e7c1c64a875d1fc6a0a # v7
99	        with:
100	          name: linux-coverage
101	          if-no-files-found: error
102	          path: |
103	            test/go/profile.out
104	            test/js/cobertura-coverage.xml
105	
106	      # Misc tests
107	      - name: Vector tests
108	        if: matrix.tests == 'misc'
109	        run: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose-dev.yml run --quiet --rm vector test
110	
111	      # Binary build
112	      - name: Build
113	        if: matrix.binary
114	        run: |
115	          make TARGETARCH=amd64 TARGETVARIANT=v3 && mv bin/akvorado bin/akvorado-amd64
116	          ! bin/akvorado-amd64 version 2>&1 | head -1 | grep -q -- -dirty$ || {
117	            git status

119	            exit 1
120	          }
121	          make TARGETARCH=arm64 && mv bin/akvorado bin/akvorado-arm64
122	      - name: Upload binary

124	        uses: actions/upload-artifact@043fb46d1a93c77aae656e7c1c64a875d1fc6a0a # v7
125	        with:
126	          name: binary

143	      contents: read

164	      contents: read

196	    steps:

199	      - uses: cachix/install-nix-action@ab739621df7a23f52766f9ccc97f38da6b7af14f # v31

246	      - build-linux

252	      contents: read

292	    permissions:

323	    needs:

326	      contents: read

336	    steps:

356	    steps:

412	          file: docker/Dockerfile
413	          platforms: >-

443	    steps:
444	      - uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@4d04d5d9486b7bd6fa91e7baf45bbb4f8b9deedd # v4
445	      - uses: docker/metadata-action@030e881283bb7a6894de51c315a6bfe6a94e05cf # v6
446	        id: meta
447	        with:
448	          images: |
449	            ghcr.io/${{ github.repository }}
450	            quay.io/${{ github.repository }}
451	          tags: |
452	            type=schedule,pattern=main
453	            type=ref,event=branch
454	            type=semver,pattern={{version}}
455	            type=semver,pattern={{major}}.{{minor}}
456	            type=semver,pattern={{major}}
457	      - uses: docker/login-action@4907a6ddec9925e35a0a9e82d7399ccc52663121 # v4
458	        with:
459	          registry: ghcr.io

462	      - uses: docker/login-action@4907a6ddec9925e35a0a9e82d7399ccc52663121 # v4

466	          password: ${{ secrets.QUAY_PASSWORD }}

---
name: CI
on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
    tags:
      - v*
  pull_request:
jobs:
  renovatebot:
    name: 🤖 Detect renovatebot action
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      pull-requests: read
    if: |
      !startsWith(github.event.head_commit.message, 'build: update Nix dependency hashes') ||
       github.ref_type == 'tag'
    steps:
      - name: Detect package ecosystem from changed files
        if: github.actor == 'renovate[bot]' && github.event_name == 'pull_request'
        id: detect
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ github.token }}
        run: |
          files=$(gh api repos/${{ github.repository }}/pulls/${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}/files --jq '.[].filename')
          has_npm=false
          has_gomod=false
          if echo "$files" | grep -q '^console/frontend/pnpm-lock.yaml$'; then
            has_npm=true
          fi
          if echo "$files" | grep -qE '^go\.sum$'; then
            has_gomod=true
          fi
          case $has_npm,$has_gomod in
            true,false) echo "package-ecosystem=npm" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT" ;;
            false,true) echo "package-ecosystem=gomod" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT" ;;
          esac
    outputs:
      package-ecosystem: ${{ steps.detect.outputs.package-ecosystem }}

  build-linux:
    name: 🐧 Test on Linux
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs:
      - build-go
      - build-js
    permissions:
      contents: read
      actions: write
    strategy:
      matrix:
        tests:
          - part 1
          - part 2
          - misc
        include:
          - tests: part 1
            compose: true
            racetests: true
            jstests: true
          - tests: part 2
            compose: true
            coverage: true
          - tests: misc
            binary: ${{ github.ref_type == 'tag' }}
    env:
      CI_AKVORADO_FUNCTIONAL_TESTS: "true"
      CI_AKVORADO_EBPF: "true"
    steps:
      # Setup
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6
        with:
          fetch-depth: ${{ matrix.binary && 0 || 1 }}
          persist-credentials: false
      - uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@4d04d5d9486b7bd6fa91e7baf45bbb4f8b9deedd # v4
        if: matrix.compose
      - name: Docker Compose up
        if: matrix.compose
        run: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose-dev.yml up --wait --wait-timeout 60 --quiet-pull
      - name: Setup
        uses: ./.github/actions/setup
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: sudo apt-get install -qqy shared-mime-info curl zip

      # Code tests
      - name: Go race tests
        if: matrix.racetests
        run: sudo -E capsh --keep=1 --user=$USER --caps=cap_bpf+eip --addamb=cap_bpf -- -c "env PATH=$PATH make test-race"
      - name: JS tests
        if: matrix.jstests
        run: make test-js
      - name: Coverage tests
        if: matrix.coverage
        run: sudo -E capsh --keep=1 --user=$USER --caps=cap_bpf+eip --addamb=cap_bpf -- -c "env PATH=$PATH make test-coverage"
      - name: Upload coverage results
        if: matrix.coverage
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@043fb46d1a93c77aae656e7c1c64a875d1fc6a0a # v7
        with:
          name: linux-coverage
          if-no-files-found: error
          path: |
            test/go/profile.out
            test/js/cobertura-coverage.xml

      # Misc tests
      - name: Vector tests
        if: matrix.tests == 'misc'
        run: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose-dev.yml run --quiet --rm vector test

      # Binary build
      - name: Build
        if: matrix.binary
        run: |
          make TARGETARCH=amd64 TARGETVARIANT=v3 && mv bin/akvorado bin/akvorado-amd64
          ! bin/akvorado-amd64 version 2>&1 | head -1 | grep -q -- -dirty$ || {
            git status
            >&2 echo "Dirty build?"
            exit 1
          }
          make TARGETARCH=arm64 && mv bin/akvorado bin/akvorado-arm64
      - name: Upload binary
        if: matrix.binary
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@043fb46d1a93c77aae656e7c1c64a875d1fc6a0a # v7
        with:
          name: binary
          path: bin/akvorado-*
          if-no-files-found: error

      # Get logs from Docker Compose on failure
      - name: Docker Compose logs
        if: failure() && matrix.compose
        run: |
          docker compose -f docker/docker-compose-dev.yml logs -t

  build-nix:
    name: ❄️ Build on Nix
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs:
      - build-go
      - build-js
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6
        with:
          persist-credentials: false
      - uses: cachix/install-nix-action@ab739621df7a23f52766f9ccc97f38da6b7af14f # v31
      - name: Update dependency hashes
        run: nix run .#update
      - name: Abort on release if not up-to-date
        if: github.ref_type == 'tag'
        run: git diff --stat --exit-code HEAD
      - name: Build
        run: nix build && ./result/bin/akvorado version

  build-macos:
    name: 🍏 Build and test on macOS
    runs-on: macos-latest
    needs:
      - build-go
      - build-js
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      # Setup
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6
        with:
          persist-credentials: false
      - name: Setup
        uses: ./.github/actions/setup

      # Build and test
      - name: Build
        run: make && ./bin/akvorado version
      - name: Tests
        run: make test-coverage-go
      - name: Upload coverage results
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@043fb46d1a93c77aae656e7c1c64a875d1fc6a0a # v7
        with:
          name: macos-coverage
          if-no-files-found: error
          path: |
            test/go/profile.out

  e2e:
    name: 🧪 End-to-end testing
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs:
      - build-go
      - build-js
    permissions:
      contents: read
    env:
      AKVORADO_COVERAGE_DIRECTORY: /tmp/akvorado-coverage
    steps:
      # Setup
      - uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@4d04d5d9486b7bd6fa91e7baf45bbb4f8b9deedd # v4
      - uses: cachix/install-nix-action@ab739621df7a23f52766f9ccc97f38da6b7af14f # v31
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6
        with:
          persist-credentials: false
      - name: Setup
        uses: ./.github/actions/setup
      - name: Build Docker container
        run: make docker-dev-coverage
      - name: Docker Compose up
        timeout-minutes: 3
        run: |
          ./.github/e2e.sh compose-setup
          COMPOSE_PROFILES=demo,prometheus,loki docker compose up --wait --quiet-pull
      - name: Run tests
        timeout-minutes: 3
        run: |
          ./.github/e2e.sh tests
      - name: Docker Compose logs
        if: failure()
        run: |
          docker compose logs -t
      - name: Collect profile
        run: |
          make -j default.pgo
          go tool pprof -top default.pgo
      - name: Upload profile
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@043fb46d1a93c77aae656e7c1c64a875d1fc6a0a # v7
        with:
          name: pgo
          if-no-files-found: error
          path: |
            default.pgo
      - name: Retrieve coverage files
        run: |
          docker compose stop
          ./.github/e2e.sh coverage
      - name: Upload coverage results
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@043fb46d1a93c77aae656e7c1c64a875d1fc6a0a # v7
        with:
          name: e2e-coverage
          if-no-files-found: error
          path: |
            ${{ env.AKVORADO_COVERAGE_DIRECTORY }}/e2e-coverage.out

  coverage:
    name: 🔍 Upload code coverage
    needs:
      - build-linux
      - build-macos
      - build-nix
      - e2e
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6
        with:
          persist-credentials: false
      - uses: actions/download-artifact@3e5f45b2cfb9172054b4087a40e8e0b5a5461e7c # v8
        with:
          name: linux-coverage
          path: test/linux
      - uses: actions/download-artifact@3e5f45b2cfb9172054b4087a40e8e0b5a5461e7c # v8
        with:
          name: macos-coverage
          path: test/macos
      - uses: actions/download-artifact@3e5f45b2cfb9172054b4087a40e8e0b5a5461e7c # v8
        with:
          name: e2e-coverage
          path: test/e2e
      - name: Upload unittests coverage
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@57e3a136b779b570ffcdbf80b3bdc90e7fab3de2 # v6
        with:
          token: &codecov-token bab8d6d9-e90c-4e37-b156-38a9a4c2108e  # not ideal, but limited risk
          files: ./test/linux/go/profile.out,./test/macos/profile.out,./test/linux/js/cobertura-coverage.xml
          flags: unittests
          disable_search: true
          fail_ci_if_error: true
      - name: Upload e2e coverage
        uses: codecov/codecov-action@57e3a136b779b570ffcdbf80b3bdc90e7fab3de2 # v6
        with:
          token: *codecov-token
          files: ./test/e2e/e2e-coverage.out
          flags: e2e
          disable_search: true
          fail_ci_if_error: true

  build-go:
    name: 🔬 Test only Go
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs:
      - renovatebot
    if: needs.renovatebot.outputs.package-ecosystem != 'npm'
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6
        with:
          persist-credentials: false
      - name: Setup
        id: setup
        uses: ./.github/actions/setup
      - name: Check go.mod was not modified
        run: |
          ! go mod edit -json | jq -r .Go | grep -vPx '1.\d+' || {
            echo "^^^^ Incorrect go directive in go.mod: use only \`minor.major'."
            exit 1
          }
      - name: Build
        run: make && ./bin/akvorado version
      - name: Save IANA files to cache
        if: steps.setup.outputs.iana-cache-hit != 'true'
        uses: actions/cache/save@27d5ce7f107fe9357f9df03efb73ab90386fccae # v5
        with:
          path: |
            orchestrator/clickhouse/data/udp.csv
            orchestrator/clickhouse/data/tcp.csv
          key: ${{ steps.setup.outputs.iana-cache-key }}
      - name: Tests
        run: make test-go

  build-js:
    name: 🔬 Test only JS
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs:
      - renovatebot
    permissions:
      contents: read
    strategy:
      matrix:
        node-version: [22, 24, 26]
        renovatebot:
          - ${{ needs.renovatebot.outputs.package-ecosystem }}
        exclude:
          - renovatebot: gomod
        include:
          - node-version: 24    # When updating Go deps, only test against this version
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6
        with:
          persist-credentials: false
      - name: Setup
        uses: ./.github/actions/setup
        with:
          setup-go: false
          node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}
      - name: Build and test JS frontend
        run: make console/data/frontend test-js

  licenses:
    name: ⚖️ Check licenses
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    needs:
      - build-go
      - build-js
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6
        with:
          persist-credentials: false
      - name: Setup
        uses: ./.github/actions/setup
      - name: License check
        run: make licensecheck

  build-docker:
    name: 🐋 Build Docker images
    needs:
      - build-go
      - build-js
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || github.ref_type == 'tag'
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: write
      attestations: write
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0        # We need the version
          persist-credentials: false
      - name: Get version
        id: version
        run: |
          echo version=$(make version) >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
      - uses: docker/setup-qemu-action@ce360397dd3f832beb865e1373c09c0e9f86d70a # v4
      - uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@4d04d5d9486b7bd6fa91e7baf45bbb4f8b9deedd # v4
      - uses: docker/metadata-action@030e881283bb7a6894de51c315a6bfe6a94e05cf # v6
        id: meta
        env:
          DOCKER_METADATA_ANNOTATIONS_LEVELS: manifest,index
        with:
          images: |
            ghcr.io/${{ github.repository }}
          tags: |
            type=raw,value=unreleased
          labels: |
            org.opencontainers.image.title=Akvorado
            org.opencontainers.image.licenses=AGPL-3.0-only
          annotations: |
            org.opencontainers.image.title=Akvorado
            org.opencontainers.image.licenses=AGPL-3.0-only
      - uses: docker/login-action@4907a6ddec9925e35a0a9e82d7399ccc52663121 # v4
        with:
          registry: ghcr.io
          username: ${{ github.repository_owner }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      - name: Build image
        id: build
        uses: docker/build-push-action@bcafcacb16a39f128d818304e6c9c0c18556b85f # v7
        with:
          context: .
          file: docker/Dockerfile
          platforms: >-
            ${{
              github.ref_type == 'tag' &&
              'linux/amd64,linux/amd64/v3,linux/arm64,linux/arm/v7' ||
              'linux/amd64/v3,linux/arm64'
            }}
          push: true
          build-args: |
            VERSION=${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
          tags: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
          labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
          annotations: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.annotations }}
          provenance: mode=max
    outputs:
      package: ghcr.io/${{ github.repository }}@${{ steps.build.outputs.digest }}

  tag-docker:
    name: 🐋 Tag Docker images
    needs:
      - build-docker
      - build-linux
      - build-macos
      - build-nix
      - e2e
      - licenses
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: write
      attestations: write
    steps:
      - uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@4d04d5d9486b7bd6fa91e7baf45bbb4f8b9deedd # v4
      - uses: docker/metadata-action@030e881283bb7a6894de51c315a6bfe6a94e05cf # v6
        id: meta
        with:
          images: |
            ghcr.io/${{ github.repository }}
            quay.io/${{ github.repository }}
          tags: |
            type=schedule,pattern=main
            type=ref,event=branch
            type=semver,pattern={{version}}
            type=semver,pattern={{major}}.{{minor}}
            type=semver,pattern={{major}}
      - uses: docker/login-action@4907a6ddec9925e35a0a9e82d7399ccc52663121 # v4
        with:
          registry: ghcr.io
          username: ${{ github.repository_owner }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      - uses: docker/login-action@4907a6ddec9925e35a0a9e82d7399ccc52663121 # v4
        with:
          registry: quay.io
          username: ${{ secrets.QUAY_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.QUAY_PASSWORD }}
      - name: Tag image
        run: |
          echo "${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}" | xargs -n1 | while read tag; do
            docker buildx imagetools create ${{ needs.build-docker.outputs.package }} --tag ${tag}
          done

  release:
    name: 🚀 Publish release
    needs:
      - tag-docker
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.ref_type == 'tag'
    permissions:
      contents: write
      actions: read
    steps:
      # Changelog
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6
        with:
          persist-credentials: false
      - name: Generate changelog
        run: make changelog.md

      # Get binary from build step
      - name: Download binary
        uses: actions/download-artifact@3e5f45b2cfb9172054b4087a40e8e0b5a5461e7c # v8
        with:
          name: binary

      # Build tarball for docker compose
      - name: Build Docker Compose "quick start"
        run: |
          sed -i s,akvorado:main,akvorado:${GITHUB_REF_NAME#v}, docker/versions.yml
          tar zcvf docker-compose-quickstart.tar.gz \
            .env docker/* \
            config/*.yaml
      - name: Build Docker Compose "upgrade"
        run: |
          mv .env .env.dist
          mv docker/docker-compose-local.yml docker/docker-compose-local.yml.dist
          tar zcvf docker-compose-upgrade.tar.gz \
            .env.dist docker/*

      # Publish release
      - name: Publish release
        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@b4309332981a82ec1c5618f44dd2e27cc8bfbfda # v3
        with:
          body_path: changelog.md
          draft: true
          prerelease: ${{ contains(github.ref, 'alpha') || contains(github.ref, 'beta') || contains(github.ref, 'rc') }}
          fail_on_unmatched_files: true
          files: |
            akvorado-*
            docker-compose-quickstart.tar.gz
            docker-compose-upgrade.tar.gz

---
name: Setup build
description: Setup the OS-independent build environment
inputs:
  setup-go:
    description: Enable Go setup
    required: false
    default: "true"
  setup-node:
    description: Enable Node setup
    required: false
    default: "true"
  node-version:
    description: Node version to install
    required: false
    default: "24"
outputs:
  iana-cache-hit:
    description: Was cache hit for IANA files?
    value: ${{ steps.iana-cache.outputs.cache-matched-key != '' }}
  iana-cache-key:
    description: Cache key to be used for IANA files
    value: ${{ steps.iana-cache.outputs.cache-primary-key }}
runs:
  using: composite
  steps:
    - uses: actions/setup-go@4a3601121dd01d1626a1e23e37211e3254c1c06c # v6
      if: ${{ inputs.setup-go == 'true' }}
      id: go-setup
      with:
        go-version-file: go.mod
        check-latest: true
        cache: false
    - name: Get Go environment
      if: ${{ inputs.setup-go == 'true' }}
      shell: bash
      run: |
        echo "gocache=$(go env GOCACHE)" >> $GITHUB_ENV
        echo "gomodcache=$(go env GOMODCACHE)" >> $GITHUB_ENV
        echo "today=$(date +%Y%m%d)" >> $GITHUB_ENV
    - uses: actions/cache@27d5ce7f107fe9357f9df03efb73ab90386fccae # v5
      if: ${{ inputs.setup-go == 'true' }}
      with:
        path: |
          ${{ env.gocache }}
          ${{ env.gomodcache }}
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-${{ runner.arch }}-go${{ steps.go-setup.outputs.go-version }}-${{ hashFiles('go.sum', 'bin/external-tool') }}-${{ env.today }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-${{ runner.arch }}-go${{ steps.go-setup.outputs.go-version }}-${{ hashFiles('go.sum', 'bin/external-tool') }}-
          ${{ runner.os }}-${{ runner.arch }}-go${{ steps.go-setup.outputs.go-version }}-
    - uses: pnpm/action-setup@26f6d4f2c533a43e6b5da0b4a5dd983f98f7b49a # v6
      if: ${{ inputs.setup-node == 'true' }}
      with:
        package_json_file: console/frontend/package.json
    - uses: actions/setup-node@48b55a011bda9f5d6aeb4c2d9c7362e8dae4041e # v6
      if: ${{ inputs.setup-node == 'true' }}
      with:
        node-version: ${{ inputs.node-version }}
        cache: pnpm
        cache-dependency-path: |
          console/frontend/pnpm-lock.yaml
          bin/external-tool
    - name: Restore IANA files from cache
      uses: actions/cache/restore@27d5ce7f107fe9357f9df03efb73ab90386fccae # v5
      id: iana-cache
      with:
        path: |
          orchestrator/clickhouse/data/udp.csv
          orchestrator/clickhouse/data/tcp.csv
        key: iana-cache-${{ hashFiles('Makefile', 'flake.lock') }}-${{ github.run_id }}
        restore-keys: |
          iana-cache-${{ hashFiles('Makefile', 'flake.lock') }}-

export CGO_ENABLED  = 0
export GOTOOLCHAIN ?= local+auto

MODULE   = $(shell $(GO) list -m)
VERSION ?= $(shell git describe --tags --always --dirty --match=v* 2> /dev/null || \
			cat .version 2> /dev/null || echo v0)
PKGS     = $(or $(PKG),$(shell $(GO) list ./...))

GO      = go
PNPM    = $(or $(shell command -v pnpm 2>/dev/null),\
			$(shell command -v corepack 2>/dev/null | sed 's/$$/ pnpm/'),\
			$(error No pnpm command found))
CLANG   = clang
TIMEOUT = 60s
LSFILES = git ls-files -cmo --exclude-standard --
V = 0
Q = $(if $(filter 1,$V),,@)
M = $(shell if [ "$$(tput colors 2> /dev/null || echo 0)" -ge 8 ]; then printf "\033[34;1m▶\033[0m"; else printf "▶"; fi)

GENERATED_JS = \
	console/frontend/node_modules
GENERATED_GO = \
	common/pb/rawflow.pb.go \
	common/pb/rawflow_vtproto.pb.go \
	common/schema/definition_gen.go \
	inlet/flow/input/udp/reuseport_bpfeb.o \
	inlet/flow/input/udp/reuseport_bpfel.o \
	orchestrator/clickhouse/data/asns.csv \
	orchestrator/clickhouse/data/protocols.csv \
	orchestrator/clickhouse/data/tcp.csv \
	orchestrator/clickhouse/data/udp.csv \
	console/filter/parser.go \
	inlet/kafka/loadbalancealgorithm_enumer.go \
	outlet/core/asnprovider_enumer.go \
	outlet/core/netprovider_enumer.go \
	outlet/metadata/provider/snmp/authprotocol_enumer.go \
	outlet/metadata/provider/snmp/privprotocol_enumer.go \
	outlet/metadata/provider/gnmi/ifspeedpathunit_enumer.go \
	console/homepagetopwidget_enumer.go \
	common/kafka/saslmechanism_enumer.go \
	common/remotedatasource/parsertype_enumer.go \
	common/remotedatasource/paginationtype_enumer.go
GENERATED_TEST_GO = \
	common/clickhousedb/mocks/mock_driver.go
GENERATED = \
	$(GENERATED_GO) \
	$(GENERATED_JS) \
	console/data/frontend \
	common/embed/data/embed.zip

.PHONY: all all-indep
BUILD_ARGS =
# For architecture variants, see:
# - https://go.dev/wiki/MinimumRequirements#amd64
# - https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/X86-64#Microarchitecture_levels
# - https://clang.llvm.org/docs/UsersManual.html#x86
# - https://go.dev/wiki/MinimumRequirements#arm64
# - https://github.com/golang/go/issues/60905
# - https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/blob/main/llvm/unittests/TargetParser/TargetParserTest.cpp#L1077
# - https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Comparison_of_ARM_processors
# - https://docs.docker.com/build/building/variables/#pre-defined-build-arguments
# - https://github.com/containerd/platforms/pull/8
all: fmt lint all-indep ; $(info $(M) building executable…) @ ## Build program binary
	$Q env GOOS=$(TARGETOS) GOARCH=$(TARGETARCH) \
         $(if $(filter amd64,$(TARGETARCH)),GOAMD64=$(TARGETVARIANT),\
         $(if $(filter arm64,$(TARGETARCH)),GOARM64=$(if $(findstring .,$(TARGETVARIANT)),$(TARGETVARIANT),$(TARGETVARIANT:%=%.0)),\
         $(if $(filter arm,$(TARGETARCH)),GOARM=$(TARGETVARIANT:v%=%)))) \
	   $(GO) build \
		-tags release,grpcnotrace,validator_novalidatefn \
		-ldflags '-X $(MODULE)/common/helpers.AkvoradoVersion=$(VERSION)' \
		$(BUILD_ARGS) \
		-o bin/$(basename $(MODULE)) ./cmd/akvorado
all-indep: $(GENERATED)

# Tools

BUF         = env GO=$(GO) ./bin/external-tool buf
ENUMER      = go tool enumer
GOIMPORTS   = go tool goimports
GOTESTSUM   = go tool gotestsum
MOCKGEN     = go tool mockgen
PIGEON      = go tool pigeon
REVIVE      = go tool revive
STATICCHECK = go tool staticcheck
WWHRD       = go tool wwhrd

# Generated files

.SUFFIXES:
.DELETE_ON_ERROR:

$(filter %.go, $(GENERATED_GO) $(GENERATED_TEST_GO)): go.mod

common/pb/rawflow.pb.go common/pb/rawflow_vtproto.pb.go &: .buf.gen.yaml common/pb/rawflow.proto ; $(info $(M) compiling protocol buffers $@…)
	$Q $(BUF) generate --template $(PWD)/.buf.gen.yaml --path $(@:.pb.go=.proto)

common/clickhousedb/mocks/mock_driver.go: ; $(info $(M) generate mocks for ClickHouse driver…)
	$Q $(MOCKGEN) -package mocks -build_constraint "!release" -destination $@ \
		github.com/ClickHouse/clickhouse-go/v2/lib/driver Conn,Row,Rows,ColumnType
	$Q touch $@

#!/bin/sh

# Wrapper to execute an external tool. This is used a bit like "go tool", but in
# a case we don't want to put the dependency in go.mod (which may be considered
# by an anti-pattern for some tools).

# See commit 414d626bf8f2 for an alternative.

cmd="$1"
shift

GO=${GO:-go}
export GOTOOLCHAIN=$(${GO} mod edit -print | sed -En 's/^toolchain //p')

case "$cmd" in
    buf)
        exec ${GO} run github.com/bufbuild/buf/cmd/buf@v1.57.0 "$@"
        ;;
esac

file.content:
FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    git \
    curl \
    build-essential \
    clang \
    pkg-config \
    ca-certificates \
    zip \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Go 1.26.1
RUN curl -fsSL https://go.dev/dl/go1.26.1.linux-amd64.tar.gz -o /tmp/go.tar.gz && \
    tar -C /usr/local -xzf /tmp/go.tar.gz && \
    rm /tmp/go.tar.gz

# Install Node.js and pnpm
RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash - && \
    apt-get install -y nodejs && \
    npm install -g pnpm && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Set PATH for Go
ENV PATH=/usr/local/go/bin:$PATH

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the repository
COPY repo/ /app/

# Download Go dependencies
RUN go mod download

# Copy run script
COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

file.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -e

cd /app

# Step 1: Check go.mod was not modified
echo "=== Checking go.mod ==="
! go mod edit -json | grep -o '"Go":"[^"]*"' | grep -vPx '"Go":"1\.\d+"' || {
    echo "^^^^ Incorrect go directive in go.mod: use only \`minor.major'."
    exit 1
}

# Step 2: Build
echo "=== Building ==="
make && ./bin/akvorado version

# Step 3: Tests
echo "=== Running tests ==="
make test-go || EXIT_CODE=$?

if [ -n "$EXIT_CODE" ]; then
    echo "FINAL_STATUS = FAIL"
    exit $EXIT_CODE
else
    echo "FINAL_STATUS = SUCCESS"
    exit 0
fi
